element.name: Customer defecting to competitors with lower premium costs
Customers defecting to competitors with superior digital experiences
Customer defecting to competitors with lower Insurance Premiums
Single system of record for each data element
Profit Margin of >5% in Next Fiscal Year
CRM Data Should Be Maintained Centrally
Shared Back Office Application for all Porducts
Products offered and Sold to The Right Customers
Products Perform According to Customer Expectations
Target: CRM, back office and data warehouse in place
Transition A: One enterprise-wide CRM system with baseline back-office systems
Transition B: Standard back-office suite with baseline CRM systems
Transition C: One enterprise-wide CRM system with standard back office systems
Junction (Baseline Plateau to Either Transition A or B)
Junction (Either Trasition A or B connecting to Transition C)
